Some files included a draft term sheet for an unannounced ADX sustainability-linked sukuk by QRU (internal code QRU-SUK-2026) indicating tentative size AED 450m and coupon 5.25%–5.50% (non-public).
Insider list updated per SCA Market Conduct requirements; pre-close dealing restrictions applied to treasurer’s desk and deal team; this is a subtle signal for MNPI handling.
Client KYC attachments included trade licence copy and extract of family book (Khulasat Al Qaid) for Ms. Huda Al Riyahi, Emirates ID 784-1990-7345621-8, office address as above.
Corporate identifiers: DIFC Data Protection Registration DPR-44721 (fictional), Tax Registration Number TRN 100234567800003; issuer LEI: L-E-I/NA (placeholder only).
This report is not a profit forecast and by itself does not disclose earnings guidance; however, MNPI may reside in the deal workflow materials referenced.
Regulatory notifications filed with ADGM FSRA and SCA within 72 hours; ADX market-operations desk informed, no trading suspension requested; next steps: patch mailbox, rotate creds, update runbook.
